hooks.command: mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/bin/output" && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/bin" && OS=$(uname -s) && ARCH=$(uname -m) && case "$OS-$ARCH" in Linux-x86_64) BIN=indexer-linux-amd64;; Darwin-x86_64) BIN=indexer-darwin-amd64;; Darwin-arm64) BIN=indexer-darwin-arm64;; MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*) BIN=indexer.exe;; *) BIN=indexer.exe;; esac && ./$BIN -build
